subcodes.first_line: O friends of Abdu'l-Baha! His honour Zia'u'llah hath arrived in the Snow-White Land and, for some time, with utmost lowliness and humility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء جناب ضیاءالله به ارض بیضاء وارد و چندی در نهایت خضوع و خشوع
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
